code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  let slen = sorted.len()
  mut k = 0
  while k < slen
    match sorted.get(k)
    when Some(s)
      if not inserted and v < s
        result = list.push(result, v)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, s)
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

fn add_token(_ nums: List<Int>, _ tok: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(tok)
    nums
  else
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if list.contains(nums, v)
        nums
      else
        insert_sorted(nums, v)
      end
    when None
      nums
    end
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      nums = add_token(nums, cur)
      cur = ""
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
nums = add_token(nums, cur)

mut out = ""
let total = nums.len()
mut m = 0
while m < total
  match nums.get(m)
  when Some(v)
    if m == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  m = m + 1
end
println(out)
